headline: BV Investment Partners Announces Sale of CallTower
summary: BV Investment Partners ("BV"), a middle-market private equity firm focused on tech-enabled business services and solutions, today announced the majority sale of CallTower, a global leader in managed cloud communications, contact center and collaboration solutions, to Court Square Capital Partners. BV and CallTower management will retain a minority stake in the business.

content.title: BV Investment Partners Announces Sale of CallTower
content.summary: BV Investment Partners ("BV"), a middle-market private equity firm focused on tech-enabled business services and solutions, today announced the majority sale of CallTower, a global leader in managed cloud communications, contact center and collaboration solutions, to Court Square Capital Partners. BV and CallTower management will retain a minority stake in the business.

headline: Semianalysis CEO: Google’s free cash flow will hit zero next year from AI capex
summary: My portfolio has benefited from the hyperscaler capex race for the better part of two years now, and even I did a double-take when Dylan Patel, CEO of semiconductor and AI research firm Semianalysis, dropped this on live television: Google’s free cash flow will be basically zero next year. headline: Precisely Appoints Software Industry Veteran Walid Abu-Hadba as Chief Executive Officer
summary: Precisely (the "Company"), a global data integrity provider backed by Clearlake Capital Group, L.P. (together with its affiliates, "Clearlake"), TA Associates, Insight Partners, and Partners Group, among other institutional investors, today announced the appointment of Walid Abu-Hadba as Chief Executive Officer ("CEO"), effective immediately. Mr. Abu-Hadba succeeds Josh Rogers, who will continue to serve in an advisory capacity as Vice Chairman to ensure a seamless leadership transition.

content.title: Precisely Appoints Software Industry Veteran Walid Abu-Hadba as Chief Executive Officer

(together with its affiliates, "Clearlake"), TA Associates, Insight Partners, and Partners Group, among other institutional investors, today announced the appointment of Walid Abu-Hadba as Chief Executive Officer ("CEO"), effective immediately. Mr. Abu-Hadba succeeds Josh Rogers, who will continue to serve in an advisory capacity as Vice Chairman to ensure a seamless leadership transition.

headline: Warren Buffett Said He And Bill Gates Haven't Been In Touch —'I Don't Want To Be In A Position Where I Know Things…To Be Called As A Witness'
summary: The two billionaires who once showed up at McDonald's armed with coupons despite holding "McGold" cards and later rolled up their sleeves to flip burgers and serve Blizzards at Dairy Queen now find themselves on radio silence. Warren Buffett made clear that the quiet is no accident. In a CNBC interview on Tuesday, the Berkshire Hathaway chairman shared that he and Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates had not spoken since the latest Jeffrey Epstein documents came to light.
